title: Implement normalized min-sum and early termination for LDPC
description: Algorithmic improvements to LDPC belief propagation decoder: implement normalized and offset min-sum variants (potential accuracy improvement over standard min-sum), and add early termination when syndrome check passes before max iterations. Current single-thread: 1.43 Mbps, target: significant improvement toward 50-100 Mbps real-time DVB-T2.
